texto: On the day of his death in his eightieth year Elliot 'the Apostle of the Indians ' was found teaching an Indian child at his bedside. 'Why not to rest from your labours now?' asked a friend. 'Because ' replied the venerable man 'I have prayed God to render me useful in my sphere and he has heard my prayers for now that I can no longer preach he leaves me strength enough to teach this poor child the alphabet.'
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de S. Chaplin que provoca temas ligados a amizade. Ao questionar “On the day of his death in his eightieth year Elliot 'the Apostle of the Indians ' was found teac…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre amizade, aging, old, com foco em luto e termino.
